---
title: "Janet Sinclair Berger"
---

## Janet Sinclair Berger

**Dates:** (1843-1931)

**Maiden name:** (Colquhoun)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1898, 1899)

### Biography

She published an anthology of devotional material (1893). She was daughter of John Colquhoun (1805-1885) and sister of the novelist Lucy Bethia (Colquhoun) Walford, who also contributed to <i>MP</i>; she married the Rev. Arthur Hastings Berger (1845-1934).

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
